name: Tasty Turkey Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small saucepan, mix dressing, flour, chicken bouillon, and pepper.
3. Gradually add milk, cooking and stirring frequently over medium-low heat until thickened.
4. Add the vegetables and poultry; cook and stir until thoroughly heated.
5. Spoon the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
6. Unroll the crescent rolls and press perforations together to seal.
7. Place rectangles side by side to form a square, pressing edges together to form a seam.
8. Cut dough into 1-inch strips. Arrange in lattice over the casserole.
9. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until golden brown. Makes 6 servings.
